ddls:
CREATE TABLE "patients" (
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each patient */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the patient */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the patient */,
  "hypertension" INTEGER /* Indicates if the patient has hypertension (0 for No, 1 for Yes) */,
  "heart_disease" INTEGER /* Indicates if the patient has heart disease (0 for No, 1 for Yes) */,
  "ever_married" TEXT /* Indicates if the patient has ever been married */,
  "ethnicity" TEXT /* Ethnicity of the patient */,
  "annual_income" TEXT /* Annual income of the patient */,
  "education_level" TEXT /* Education level of the patient */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "lifestyle_factors" (
  "lifestyle_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the lifestyle record */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the patient associated with this lifestyle data */,
  "work_type" TEXT /* Type of work the patient is engaged in (e.g., Private, Self-employed) */,
  "residence_type" TEXT /* Type of residence (e.g., Urban, Rural) */,
  "avg_glucose_level" REAL /* Average glucose level of the patient */,
  "bmi" REAL /* Body Mass Index of the patient */,
  "smoking_status" TEXT /* Smoking status of the patient (e.g., never smoked, smokes, formerly smoked) */,
  "physical_activity_level" TEXT /* Physical activity level of the patient (e.g., Sedentary, Lightly Active) */,
  "diet_type" TEXT /* Diet type of the patient (e.g., Vegetarian, Non-Vegetarian) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("lifestyle_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_lifestyle_factors_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stroke_history" (
  "stroke_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the stroke record */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the patient associated with this stroke record */,
  "stroke" INTEGER /* Indicates if the patient has suffered a stroke (0 for No, 1 for Yes) */,
  "stroke_date" TEXT /* Date when the stroke occurred */,
  "stroke_type" TEXT /* Type of stroke (e.g., Ischemic, Hemorrhagic) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stroke_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stroke_history_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "medical_conditions" (
  "condition_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the medical condition record */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the patient associated with this condition */,
  "condition_type" TEXT /* Type of medical condition (e.g., Hypertension, Heart Disease) */,
  "condition_status" TEXT /* Status of the medical condition (e.g., Managed, Unmanaged) */,
  "diagnosis_date" TEXT /* Date when the condition was diagnosed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("condition_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_medical_conditions_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "patients_medications" (
  "medication_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the medication record */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the patient associated with this medication */,
  "medication_name" TEXT /* Name of the medication prescribed */,
  "dose" TEXT /* Dosage of the medication */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date when the medication was started */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date when the medication was stopped */,
  "medication_type" TEXT /* Type of medication (e.g., Prescription, Over-the-counter) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("medication_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_patients_medications_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "appointments" (
  "appointment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the appointment record */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the patient associated with this appointment */,
  "appointment_date" TEXT /* Date of the appointment */,
  "doctor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the doctor handling the appointment */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for the appointment */,
  "appointment_status" TEXT /* Status of the appointment (e.g., Scheduled, Completed, Cancelled) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("appointment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_appointments_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_appointments_doctor_id FOREIGN KEY ("doctor_id") REFERENCES doctors ("doctor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "doctors" (
  "doctor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each doctor */,
  "doctor_name" TEXT /* Full name of the doctor */,
  "specialization" TEXT /* Specialization of the doctor (e.g., Cardiologist, General Practitioner) */,
  "years_of_experience" INTEGER /* Years of experience of the doctor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("doctor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ehr_systems" (
  "ehr_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the EHR system */,
  "ehr_name" TEXT /* Name of the EHR system */,
  "ehr_version" TEXT /* Version of the EHR system */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ehr_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ehr_integration" (
  "integration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the integration record */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the patient associated with this integration */,
  "ehr_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the EHR system associated with this integration */,
  "integration_date" TEXT /* Date when the patient was integrated with the EHR system */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("integration_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ehr_integration_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ehr_integration_ehr_id FOREIGN KEY ("ehr_id") REFERENCES ehr_systems ("ehr_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was generated */,
  "report_data" TEXT /* Data contained in the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id")
)
